pageDescription: Calculate your ideal body weight range based on height and gender

bmiFormula.label: BMI Formula
bmiFormula.metric: BMI = weight in kg / (height in meters)²

devine.title: Devine Method (1974)
devine.description: Men: 50 kg + 2.3 kg per inch over 5 feet; Women: 45.5 kg + 2.3 kg per inch over 5 feet

robinson.title: Robinson Method (1983)
robinson.description: Men: 52 kg + 1.9 kg per inch over 5 feet; Women: 49 kg + 1.7 kg per inch over 5 feet

miller.title: Miller Method (1983)
miller.description: Men: 56.2 kg + 1.41 kg per inch over 5 feet; Women: 53.1 kg + 1.36 kg per inch over 5 feet

hamwi.title: Hamwi Method (1964)
hamwi.description: Men: 48 kg + 2.7 kg per inch over 5 feet; Women: 45.5 kg + 2.2 kg per inch over 5 feet

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estimates only and is not a diagnostic tool
criticalWarningsList.individualVariation: Ideal weight varies based on muscle mass, bone density, and body composition

importantNotesList: These calculations provide general guidelines only
Athletes may have higher weight due to muscle mass
Consult healthcare professionals for personalized advice
Weight should be considered alongside other health metrics

healthyRangeDetails.title: 18.5 – 25 kg/m²
healthyRangeDetails.description: is considered the healthy BMI range for adults.
healthyRangeDetails.association: This range is associated with the lowest risk of health problems and mortality.

messages.enterMeasurements: Enter your measurements to calculate your ideal weight range
messages.currentWeightStatus: Your current weight is {status} the ideal range
messages.ageWarning: For children and adolescents (≤20 years), use pediatric growth charts

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estimates based on mathematical formulas and should not be used as a substitute for professional medical advice. Individual results may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Consult a Healthcare Professional
seekHelp.content: If you have concerns about your weight or health, please consult with a healthcare professional who can provide personalized advice based on your complete medical history and individual circumstances.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm

tooltips.age: Age can affect ideal weight calculations for children/adolescents
tooltips.gender: Different formulas are used for men and women

enter_your_details_to_calculate_your_ide: Enter your details to calculate your ideal weight using multiple formulas
enter_your_details_and_click_calculate_s: Enter your details and click Calculate see your ideal weight ranges.
based_on_who_bmi_range_of_18525_kgm_this:
Based on WHO BMI range of 18.5-25 kg/m². This range provides more flexibility than
                          formula-based estimates.
oldest_formula_originally_for_drug_dosin: Oldest formula, originally for drug dosing
most_commonly_used_in_medical_practice_6: Most commonly used in medical practice
tends_to_give_slightly_lower_weights_62: Tends to give slightly lower weights
formulas_dont_account_for_body_compositi: Formulas don't account for body composition
athletes_may_weigh_more_due_to_muscle_ma: Athletes may weigh more due to muscle mass
